effect.subject: text_color_within_sentence
effect.reserved_for: one color per sentence (heading or body)

rule_text: There should be no instance of mixing two colors within the same sentence. Each sentence, be it a heading or body, needs to have only one color.
intent: Prevent multi-color text runs that fragment readability.
summary: Each sentence, including headings and body, must use only one color; no mixing of two colors within the same sentence.
